headline: Does New LNG Bunkering in Roatán Transform the Bull Case for Carnival’s Greener Operations (CCL)?
summary: Carnival Corporation recently completed the first LNG bunker fueling operation in Latin America and the Western Caribbean, using a mobile LNG solution to refuel Carnival Jubilee at Isla Tropicale in Roatán, Honduras, advancing both regional infrastructure and its 2050 net zero ship-operations goal. This new bunkering capability, alongside ongoing destination and fleet upgrades, could influence how investors view Carnival’s ability to manage fuel costs, regulatory pressures, and guest...
